# DTO Types
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureNspAccessRule # Represents an access rule configuration for an Azure Network Security Perimeter.
  AddressPrefixes?: Aspire.Hosting/List<string> # Gets the list of inbound address prefixes (CIDR ranges) allowed by this rule.
  AddressPrefixReferences?: Aspire.Hosting/List<Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ReferenceExpression> # Gets the list of inbound address prefixes (CIDR ranges)  values allowed by this rule.
  Direction: enum:Azure.Provisioning.Network.NetworkSecurityPerimeterAccessRuleDirection # Gets or sets the direction of the rule.
  FullyQualifiedDomainNameReferences?: Aspire.Hosting/List<Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ReferenceExpression> # Gets the fully qualified domain name  values allowed by this rule.
  FullyQualifiedDomainNames?: Aspire.Hosting/List<string> # Gets the list of fully qualified domain names (FQDNs) allowed by this rule.
  Name: string # Gets or sets the name of the access rule. This name must be unique within the perimeter profile.
  SubscriptionReferences?: Aspire.Hosting/List<Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ReferenceExpression> # Gets the subscription resource ID  values allowed by this rule.
  Subscriptions?: Aspire.Hosting/List<string> # Gets the list of subscription IDs allowed by this rule.
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSecurityRule # Represents a security rule configuration for an Azure Network Security Group.
  Access: enum:Azure.Provisioning.Network.SecurityRuleAccess # Gets or sets whether network traffic is allowed or denied.
  Description: string # Gets or sets an optional description for the security rule.
  DestinationAddressPrefix: string # Gets or sets the destination address prefix. Defaults to "*" (any).
  DestinationAddressPrefixReference: Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ReferenceExpression # Gets or sets a  whose value is resolved at deploy time and used as the destination address prefix for the rule. Takes precedence over .
  DestinationPortRange: string # Gets or sets the destination port range. Use "*" for any, or a range like "80-443".
  Direction: enum:Azure.Provisioning.Network.SecurityRuleDirection # Gets or sets the direction of the rule.
  Name: string # Gets or sets the name of the security rule. This name must be unique within the Network Security Group.
  Priority: number # Gets or sets the priority of the rule. Valid values are between 100 and 4096. Lower numbers have higher priority.
  Protocol: enum:Azure.Provisioning.Network.SecurityRuleProtocol # Gets or sets the network protocol this rule applies to.
  SourceAddressPrefix: string # Gets or sets the source address prefix. Defaults to "*" (any).
  SourceAddressPrefixReference: Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ReferenceExpression # Gets or sets a  whose value is resolved at deploy time and used as the source address prefix for the rule. Takes precedence over .
  SourcePortRange: string # Gets or sets the source port range. Defaults to "*" (any).

# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/addAzureVirtualNetwork(name: string, addressPrefix?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureVirtualNetworkResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/addNatGateway(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureNatGatewayResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/addNetworkSecurityGroup(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureNetworkSecurityGroupResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/addNetworkSecurityPerimeter(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureNetworkSecurityPerimeterResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/addPrivateEndpoint(target: Aspire.Hosting.Azure/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.IAzurePrivateEndpointTarget) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzurePrivateEndpointResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/addPublicIPAddress(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzurePublicIPAddressResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/addSubnet(name: string, addressPrefix: string, subnetName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSubnetResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/allowInbound(port?: string, from?: string, to?: string, protocol?: enum:Azure.Provisioning.Network.SecurityRuleProtocol, priority?: number, name?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSubnetResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/allowOutbound(port?: string, from?: string, to?: string, protocol?: enum:Azure.Provisioning.Network.SecurityRuleProtocol, priority?: number, name?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSubnetResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/associateWithNetworkSecurityPerimeter(nsp: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureNetworkSecurityPerimeterResource, accessMode?: enum:Azure.Provisioning.Network.NetworkSecurityPerimeterAssociationAccessMode, associationName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/denyInbound(port?: string, from?: string, to?: string, protocol?: enum:Azure.Provisioning.Network.SecurityRuleProtocol, priority?: number, name?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSubnetResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/denyOutbound(port?: string, from?: string, to?: string, protocol?: enum:Azure.Provisioning.Network.SecurityRuleProtocol, priority?: number, name?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSubnetResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/withAccessRule(rule: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureNspAccessRule) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureNetworkSecurityPerimeterResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/withNatGateway(natGateway: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureNatGatewayResource) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSubnetResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/withNetworkSecurityGroup(nsg: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureNetworkSecurityGroupResource) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSubnetResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/withPublicIPAddress(publicIPAddress: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzurePublicIPAddressResource) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureNatGatewayResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/withSecurityRule(rule: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSecurityRule) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureNetworkSecurityGroupResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/withSubnetDelegatedSubnet(subnet: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Network/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSubnetResource) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.IAzureDelegatedSubnetResource
